findings.title: Package directory layout title intentionally carries the closeout handoff slice
findings.disposition: The weighted ledger title is authoritative for this generated M10.S01 slice; implemented_surface, implemented_slice, purpose, validator block, and README disambiguate it as metadata-only closeout handoff.

findings.title: Non-UI gate field naming differs between contract weighted applicability and layout/fixture applicability
findings.disposition: The naming difference is intentional because contract weighted gates use ledger gate ids while model and fixture use reader-facing applicability fields; all values are not_applicable_metadata_handoff_only and validator checks each block.

findings.title: requiredEvidenceRoots records bookends rather than all 51 evidence roots
findings.disposition: The complete proof is the 51-entry completed_domain_model_subphases_required list plus validator per-prerequisite production_ready closeout checks; requiredEvidenceRoots intentionally records first/last bookend evidence roots.

findings.title: Confirm no stale registry.nextSubphase assertions remain
findings.disposition: Focused model tests and npm test pass; grep confirms CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY.nextSubphase assertions now expect RP00.P02.M00.S01 and remaining RP00.P01.M10.S01 references are S03 handoff or M10 identity assertions.

findings.title: Confirm CONTROL_PLANE_BOUNDARY_FLAGS dependency
findings.disposition: CONTROL_PLANE_BOUNDARY_FLAGS is exported from states.js and tests verify noRealData true and writesProductState false; the M10 default-layout assertion also exercises those fields.

findings.title: Record M10 closeout evidence
findings.disposition: packet.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are recorded for M10.

findings.title: Run RP00 validator and local tests after evidence materialization
findings.disposition: Final validation reruns npm run rp00:control-plane:validate and local tests after evidence materialization.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the M10.S01 metadata-only Domain Model closeout handoff with no P0/P1/P2 findings. The review confirmed the 51 prerequisite RP00.P01 subphases through RP00.P01.M09.S03, required exports, registry exposure, next boundary RP00.P02.M00.S01, non-UI gate applicability, no service logic creation, no states.js or entity-registry mutation, no real data, no product-state writes, and no RP00 completion claim. P3 findings are informational and confirmed or adjudicated by validator, tests, and closeout evidence.
